prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic action photograph in a clean light gray studio environment: exactly 2 main subjects, a joyful young man riding a classic silver retro motorcycle at high speed and a fluffy white sheep leaping beside him while carrying a small wicker basket. Use a medium full-body shot from a dynamic close side-angle perspective, with the motorcycle entering from the left foreground and angled slightly toward the viewer, the rider leaning forward with both hands on the handlebars. The man has dark brown short styled hair and wears a black casual jacket over a light gray button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, blue jeans, and black sneakers. The motorcycle is a polished vintage silver road bike with a large glowing round headlight, chrome mirrors, visible engine parts, front forks, black handlebar grips, orange turn signals, and motion-blurred spinning wheels. The sheep is on the right side of the frame, airborne with all four legs lifted, woolly cream fleece, small ears, and a humorous determined pose while holding a brown woven basket by its handle. Apply realistic studio lighting, crisp detail on chrome and fabric, soft floor shadows, subtle motion blur on the ground and wheels, high-speed energy, shallow depth of field, and a neutral gray seamless background. Keep the composition vertical, cinematic, playful, and photorealistic; do not add text, logos, extra animals, extra riders, or background props.
